messages.content:
Derive interfaces for each child.

Parent: ChatApp
Purpose: Handle real-time messaging operations

Parent inputs: input: Any - JSON with command (send/history/create_channel/join)
Parent outputs: output: Any - JSON with success, data, message

Available Data Stores:
  - messages (memory, read_write)
  - channels (memory, read_write)

Children (frozen from Stage 1):
  ParseAndValidateInput: Parse the input JSON and validate the command field
    behavior: Parse input JSON, check if command is one of allowed values, return parsed command and payload
    role: validate
  SendMessage: Send a message to a channel the user has joined
    behavior: Check if user is member of channel, then store message in messages store
    role: execute
  GetHistory: Retrieve last 100 messages from a channel the user has joined
    behavior: Check membership, then query messages store for channel, limit to 100
    role: query
  CreateChannel: Create a new channel and add creator as member
    behavior: Check if channel name already exists, if not create and add user to members list
    role: execute
  JoinChannel: Add user to an existing channel's member list
    behavior: Check if channel exists and user not already member, then add user
    role: execute

Return ONLY the JSON response.
